constraint.name: ca_rest_caja_facturas_caja
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idcaja) REFERENCES rest_cajas (idcaja) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_rest_caja_facturas_factura
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idfactura) REFERENCES facturascli (idfactura) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_rest_caja_facturas_users
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
